user.title: WebAuthn / Passkey Authentication Setup
user.description:
Configure passkey (WebAuthn / FIDO2) authentication for Home Assistant.

**RP ID** must match your domain (e.g. `homeassistant.local`).
**Expected origin** must be the full URL users access HA from.

data_description.rp_id: The domain name of your Home Assistant instance, without scheme or port (e.g. `homeassistant.local`).
data_description.rp_name: A human-readable name shown in passkey prompts (e.g. `Home Assistant`).
data_description.expected_origin: The full URL users use to access Home Assistant, including scheme and port if needed.

error.invalid_rp_id: RP ID must be a plain domain name without scheme or port.
error.invalid_origin: Expected origin must start with `https://` or `http://`.

abort.already_configured: WebAuthn / Passkey Authentication is already configured.
